records.question: Which genres have a rating of 8, are most popular in Bangladesh, and include songs rated at least 10 from artists and songs both based in India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN artist ON genre.g_name = artist.preferred_genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE song.rating >= 10 AND genre.rating = '8' AND artist.country = 'India' AND song.country = 'India' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'Bangladesh'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
WHERE g.rating = '8'
  AND g.most_popular_in = 'Bangladesh'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM artist a
    WHERE a.preferred_genre = g.g_name
      AND a.country = 'India'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM song s
    WHERE s.genre_is = g.g_name
      AND s.rating >= 10
      AND s.country = 'India'
  )

records.question: Which genres with a rating of 7 are most popular in Canada?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE genre.rating = '7' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'Canada'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
INNER JOIN song s ON g.g_name = s.genre_is
WHERE g.rating = '7' AND g.most_popular_in = 'Canada'

records.question: Which genres with a rating of 7 are most popular in Canada and have an English song called My love released on 24-JAN-2007 that’s rated 6, from the USA, and has a resolution of at most 1080?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE genre.rating = '7' AND song.song_name = 'My love' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'Canada' AND song.rating = 6 AND song.country = 'USA' AND song.resolution <= 1080 AND song.languages = 'english' AND song.releasedate = '24-JAN-2007'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT g.g_name
FROM genre g
WHERE g.rating = '7'
  AND g.most_popular_in = 'Canada'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM song s
    WHERE s.genre_is = g.g_name
      AND s.song_name = 'My love'
      AND s.rating = 6
      AND s.country = 'USA'
      AND s.resolution <= 1080
      AND s.languages = 'english'
      AND s.releasedate = DATE('2007-01-24')
  )

records.question: What genres are associated with the song Tumi robe nirobe that was released on 28-AUG-2011 with a rating of 8 and a resolution of 1080?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE song.song_name = 'Tumi robe nirobe' AND song.releasedate = '28-AUG-2011' AND song.rating = 8 AND song.resolution = 1080
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
INNER JOIN song s ON g.g_name = s.genre_is
WHERE s.song_name = 'Tumi robe nirobe'
  AND s.releasedate = DATE '2011-08-28'
  AND s.rating = 8
  AND s.resolution = 1080

records.question: Which genres rated 7 are most popular in Canada and have songs named My love released on 24-JAN-2007 in the USA with a rating of at least 6, performed by artists from the USA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN artist ON genre.g_name = artist.preferred_genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
WHERE genre.most_popular_in = 'Canada' AND song.song_name = 'My love' AND artist.country = 'USA' AND genre.rating = '7' AND song.rating >= 6 AND song.releasedate = '24-JAN-2007' AND song.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
WHERE g.most_popular_in = 'Canada'
  AND g.rating = '7'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM artist a
    WHERE a.preferred_genre = g.g_name
      AND a.country = 'USA'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM song s
    WHERE s.genre_is = g.g_name
      AND s.song_name = 'My love'
      AND s.rating >= 6
      AND s.releasedate = DATE '2007-01-24'
      AND s.country = 'USA'
  )

records.question: Which genres have songs with files that have a duration of exactly 4:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
JOIN files ON song.f_id = files.f_id
WHERE files.duration = '4:30'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
JOIN song s ON g.g_name = s.genre_is
JOIN files f ON s.f_id = f.f_id
WHERE f.duration = '4:30'

records.question: What genres have a rating that is exactly 8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
WHERE genre.rating = '8'
records.pred_sql: SELECT g_name FROM genre WHERE rating = '8'

records.question: Which genres have songs rated at least 10 released exactly on 27-MAR-2004 by female artists from India?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
JOIN artist ON song.artist_name = artist.artist_name
WHERE song.rating >= 10 AND artist.gender = 'Female' AND song.releasedate = '27-MAR-2004' AND artist.country = 'India'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM song s
    WHERE s.genre_is = g.g_name
    AND s.rating >= 10
    AND s.releasedate = DATE '2004-03-27'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM artist a
        WHERE a.artist_name = s.artist_name
        AND a.gender = 'Female'
        AND a.country = 'India'
    )
)

records.question: Which genres rated 9 are most popular in America and feature English songs from the UK named Just beat it that have a duration of 4:34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT genre.g_name FROM genre
JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is
JOIN files ON song.f_id = files.f_id
WHERE song.song_name = 'Just beat it' AND files.duration = '4:34' AND song.languages = 'english' AND genre.most_popular_in = 'America' AND song.country = 'UK' AND genre.rating = '9'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT g.g_name
FROM genre g
WHERE g.most_popular_in = 'America'
  AND g.rating = '9'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM song s
    WHERE s.genre_is = g.g_name
      AND s.song_name = 'Just beat it'
      AND s.languages = 'english'
      AND s.country = 'UK'
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM files f
        WHERE f.f_id = s.f_id
          AND f.duration = '4:34'
      )
  )

JOIN song ON genre.g_name = song.genre_is

records.pred_sql:

)
